channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Trump’s pick for FCC chairman is Brendan Carr
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump on Sunday named Brendan Carr, the senior Republican on the Federal Communications Commission, as the new chairman of the agency tasked with regulating broadcasting, telecommunications, and broadband.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Roblox debuts new child protection, parental control features
item.description: Following recent questions about child safety issues on the platform, Roblox announced Monday a number of changes designed to protect young users and increase parental control over the content they see.
item.dc:creator: Steven Melendez, Fast Company

item.title: AI platforms driving business transformation in the UAE: insights from industry experts
item.description: In today’s fast-paced digital landscape, AI platforms are playing a pivotal role in reshaping industries and driving business transformation.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: The ‘Great IT Rebrand’: Restructuring IT for business success
item.description: Traditionally viewed as rock-solid and steady, the insurance industry is not exactly associated with taking big risks.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Trump names Brendan Carr, senior GOP leader at FCC, to lead the agency
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump has named the senior Republican on the Federal Communications Commission as the new chairman of the agency tasked with regulating broadcasting, telecommunications and broadband.
item.dc:creator: Will Weissert And Colleen Long, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Amazon developing driver eyeglasses to shave seconds off deliveries
item.description: Such directions could shave valuable seconds off each delivery by providing left or right directions off elevators and around obstacles such as gates or aggressive dogs.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, NewsNation

item.title: AI is already taking jobs, research shows. Routine tasks are the first to go
item.description: Generative AI tools such as ChatGPT are already impacting the job market. A new study shows a 21% reduction in demand for freelance jobs that are automation-prone and don’t require consistent human attention.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: Australia is planning to block TikTok and Instagram for kids under 16
item.description: How do you remove children from the harms of social media? Politically the answer appears simple in Australia, but practically the solution could be far more difficult.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Cruise admits to filing false report to sway federal probe into San Francisco crash
item.description: The autonomous car company did not include details about a woman being dragged over 20 feet by one of its self-driving vehicles.
item.dc:creator: Jason Green, The Mercury News

item.title: PCs with NPUs tweaked for AI now account for one of every five PCs shipped, says Canalys
item.description: One out of every five PCs shipped in the third quarter of 2024, a total of 13.3 million units, was a PC with a neural processing unit (NPU) fine-tuned for generative AI (genAI) development, according to data published Wednesday by analyst firm Canalys.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Polymarket at center of political storm after reported FBI raid
item.description: Prediction betting market Polymarket and its founder and CEO Shayne Coplan have found themselves at the center of a debate about political betting after the FBI reportedly raided Coplan’s home on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: AI is everywhere. How should California schools handle it? Teachers’ different approaches show its potential — and limits
item.description: 'We’re trying to teach the ethical use of these new tools that are just going to keep on growing,' one teacher says.
item.dc:creator: Kristen Taketa, The Mercury News

item.title: Silicon Valley’s ‘Bitcoin Jesus’ fights $48 million IRS tax evasion case from Spanish island
item.description: Roger Ver grew up in Silicon Valley, founding a computer company called MemoryDealers at the precocious age of 19. He also engaged in tax protests and ran for California’s legislature at 21 as a libertarian.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: All agencies to give grant funding opportunities a facelift
item.description: A year since it launched, the Council of Federal Financial Assistance already is improving the transparency, accountability and results of grant funding. The post All agencies to give grant funding opportunities a facelift first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: Japan's SoftBank returns to profit after gains at Vision Fund and other investments
item.description: TOKYO (AP) — Japanese technology group SoftBank swung back to profitability in the July-September quarter, boosted by positive results in its Vision Fund investments. Tokyo-based SoftBank Group Corp.
item.dc:creator: YURI KAGEYAMA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC
